name: Danielle Paulson
role: Friend's Birthday · Mid-July 2026 · ~50 guests · Swim Elite mansion, Haverhill MA

handling.tone: Text-only by explicit request. Premium venue, Vinwood Tim referral, hosting for friend = host vulnerability. Frame as 'we make YOU look like the smart host who picked the right team.'
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: warm, brief, text-first. Reference Tim/Vinwood referral once warmly without name-dropping awkwardly. Over-deliver on responsiveness; under-promise on the food.
handling.context: Inbound Apr 21. Tasting BOOKED for May 17 at 2 PM. Recommended by Tim at Vinwood Catering. Hosting friend's birthday at rented Swim Elite mansion. Foodie 'guncles' coming. Skipping pro bartender (BYOB), bar setup still desired. Kids run interference (her note: 'my daughter steals my phone all the time').

context_anchors: Tasting BOOKED — Sunday May 17, 2:00 PM Fitchburg
Swim Elite-rented '~$1M mansion' backyard, outdoor kitchen + pool
719 Colorado Springs area code on Haverhill resident — recent transplant

lead.source: comeketocatering.com (FB Lead Form + Free Tasting Opt-In)
lead.next_move: Pre-tasting check-in: dietary needs in friend group + anything specific to cover at tasting

enrichment.identity_notes: 719 (Colorado Springs) area code on Haverhill resident = recent move from Colorado. Surname 'Cosky' in email vs 'Paulson' last name = maiden vs married. Don't ask which; let her volunteer. Industry-adjacent (Tim/Vinwood). Knows what good catering looks like. Premium budget signaled by Swim Elite venue choice.
win_angles: Tim/Vinwood referral as warm credibility — reference once
Bar + finger foods + full-service trifecta = 'hosted, not catered' framing
Premium venue = Insta-grade visuals; talk feel of night not food list
Birthday for friend = host vulnerability, take risk off her plate
Text-preferred — she told us, honor it
nepq_openers: Pre-tasting: 'Hey Danielle — May 17 is locked. Quick question before then: any dietary needs in the friend group, or anything specific you want to cover during the tasting?'
Frame: 'Since you're hosting for someone else, what's the part of the night you're most nervous about getting wrong on her behalf?'
Identity: 'Tim mentioned you're in good hands — what made you trust him on the recommendation?'
Anchor (text): 'Mansion + 50 eating + bar + finger foods + full service = $X-Y range depending on bar setup. Tight version with two options?'
open_gaps: Bar style preference (open vs cash, signature cocktail, beer/wine)
Final venue address and Swim Elite house rules
enrichment.strategic_note: Warmest of the warm. Came through paid + organic, opted into tasting on her own, accepted quote, prefers text, hosting luxury-venue event for friend who recommended us. Strategic frame: 'make her feel like the smart host who picked the right team.' Over-deliver on responsiveness, under-promise on food, let May 17 do the closing work.

comms.summary: FB Lead Form + Free Tasting Opt-In — anytime after 1:30
'I can speak through text if that ok' — text preference confirmed
Ballpark quote + tasting options for 50 guests
Asked about full service incl. bartending and servers
16-min discovery — venue, menu, tasting locked May 17

notes: Tasting booked = closer's golden ticket, don't fumble May 17
